user_outcome: `sworn merge-release` and `sworn regress` succeed against any current-format (board.json-backed) release instead of hard-erroring with "release_worktree_path not found in index.md frontmatter".
rationale: cmd/sworn/merge.go's resolveReleaseWorktree (used by cmdMergeRelease) and cmd/sworn/regress.go's extractReleaseWorktreePath both look for a release_worktree_path: key in index.md frontmatter that sworn render's current output never emits — a hard error, not a silent failure, but a hard error against every current-format release is still a broken command.

effort_complexity.rationale: Two files, one function each, same fix pattern as every other slice in this release: read board.json's release_worktree_path field via the oracle instead of frontmatter.

acceptance_criteria.text: When `sworn merge-release <release>` runs against a release with a committed board.json, `resolveReleaseWorktree` SHALL read `release_worktree_path` from board.json (via the oracle) instead of index.md frontmatter, and the command SHALL succeed instead of erroring.

When `sworn regress <release>` runs against a release with a committed board.json, `extractReleaseWorktreePath` SHALL read the same field the same way, and the command SHALL succeed instead of erroring.
Releases with no board.json (genuinely pre-migration) SHALL continue to resolve via the existing frontmatter fallback — this slice does not regress support for them.

`cmd/sworn/merge_test.go` and `cmd/sworn/regress_test.go`'s hand-written frontmatter fixtures SHALL be regenerated via the real `sworn render` path (or supplemented with a board.json-backed fixture case) so these commands are proven against what the renderer actually produces, not only the legacy shape.

Reachability artefact: running `sworn merge-release` (or `sworn regress`, whichever is more directly testable without a real merge) against one of this repo's own current-format releases (e.g. `2026-07-01-loop-cli-ux`) SHALL be captured as command output proving it no longer errors on the frontmatter lookup.
After the change, `go build ./...` SHALL succeed and `go test ./cmd/sworn/...` SHALL pass.
